With ThisForm

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		lcQuery = [Select Codigos, Descrs ] + ;
				    [From SigCdGcr ] + ;
				   [Where GerBals = 1]

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	Select crSigCdGcr
	Set Order to BalCodigo
	If Not Seek(This.Value)
		loBrowse = CreateObject('fwBuscaSel', 'crSigCdGcr', 'BalCodigo', This.Value, 'Cadastro de Grupos')
		loBrowse.AddColuna('Codigos', '', 'Código',    .t., 'BalCodigo' )
		loBrowse.AddColuna('Descrs',  '', 'Descriçăo', .t., 'BalDescrs' )
		loBrowse.Show
		If Lastkey() <> 27
			This.Value = crSigCdGcr.Codigos 
		EndIf
	EndIf
EndIf

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	Select crSigCdCli
